title: paraphlomis javanica var. coronata
intro: Paraphlomis javanica var. coronata, also known as the Javanese Flom or Indonesian Flom, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paraphlomis javanica var. coronata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating various skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
